headline: Why Nokia Is Still A Buy Above $10

headline: Canadian Copper Inc. Announces Up to $96M in Project Development Capital, Deepens Strategic Partnership with Ocean Partners, and Welcomes OR Royalties Inc. as New Partner
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - April 14, 2026) - Canadian Copper Inc. (CSE: CCI) ("Canadian Copper" or the "Company") announces that it has secured up to $96,000,000 ("Project Financing") in committed capital from OR Royalties Inc. ("OR Royalties"), a global top-5 precious metal streaming company, and Ocean Partners UK Limited ("Ocean Partners") to advance development of its 100%-owned Murray Brook Project and Caribou Process Plant ("Combined Strategy" or "Bathurst Complex"). The Project...

headline: 2 New REIT Buyout Targets
summary: Private equity is circling REITs as discounts to asset value remain unusually wide. Read why SBAC and UNIT stocks stand out as especially likely takeover candidates.
